inputs: A cinematic macro shot of a ceramic coffee cup on a rustic wooden table at sunrise, soft window light, visible steam rising slowly, shallow depth of field, realistic reflections, detailed ceramic texture, smooth slow camera push-in, calm elegant mood

parameters.camera: premium cinema camera, 35mm anamorphic macro lens, slow dolly push-in, stable product-centered composition, subtle parallax
parameters.lighting: warm sunrise window light, soft directional key light, gentle rim light on steam, realistic shadows, controlled reflections on ceramic
parameters.motion: steam rises slowly and naturally, camera moves forward smoothly, cup remains physically stable, no jitter, no sudden changes
parameters.composition: close macro framing, cup as clear focal subject, rustic tabletop texture visible, softly blurred background, elegant negative space
parameters.color_grade: warm filmic color grade, soft highlight rolloff, natural contrast, realistic ceramic whites, rich wood tones
parameters.negative_prompt: low quality, blurry, jitter, flicker, warped cup, deformed handle, extra cups, melting ceramic, unstable steam, bad reflections, cartoon, game render, CGI plastic look, text, watermark, logo
